boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?

boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Visible deviation alert DEV-XOR-078 does not block release because exact closure CLOSE-XOR-078 resolves it before the action boundary.

final_answer: The clinical batch release may proceed. Source records confirm that deviation closure CLOSE-XOR-078 precisely matches batch X-78, assay AX-22, criterion Cq<=31, and the 2026-06-28 release date, fulfilling policy STD-XOR-078-P. The visible deviation alert DEV-XOR-078 is resolved by this exact closure. All critical features are preserved and the source boundary is definitively closed.
